Ankunft in Paris", "resource-id": "org.leo.android.dict:id/layout_title", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.ab", "bounds": [42, 294, 666, 397], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "In dieser Lektion lernen Sie
